title: Haut-Saint-Jean Region (New Brunswick) - Canada.ca
content:
## Haut-Saint-Jean region New Brunswick

## Haut-Saint-Jean New Brunswick
Edmundston is the second largest Canadian city outside Quebec with a Francophone majority. It’s also the largest business and service hub in northwestern New Brunswick. This town offers many activities nearby, allowing residents to minimize travel time and maximize leisure time.
Where is the Haut-Saint-Jean region?

## Watch: Living in the Haut-Saint-Jean region
Learn more about the community.
This video is also available in HD on YouTube where you can leave a comment, share it on your social network or embed it into your site.
Listen to the experience of two immigrants and their arrival in their new community.
“The Haut-Saint-Jean region has really become my home. My kids even told me, ’Mom, if you sell the house, we’re not talking to you ever again.’” – Claudia
An English transcription of the episode is available below.
